footer.attribution: Bangalore Votes, an Oorvani Foundation initiative

__hints.common.notDeclared: Shown in place of a candidate field the candidate has not filled in — neutral, not accusatory.
__hints.common.source.curator: Distinguish from official/affidavit sources — this is our editorial team's compiled context, not a government document.
__hints.common.flagError: Action label on the button citizens tap to report incorrect info on any field.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.defaultLabel: Default label on the statutory-deadline countdown banner (design-system.md §7.6); a specific page may override with its own label key, e.g. voter-registration roll closure.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.daysLeft: The countdown figure suffix, e.g. '12 days left' — {days} is a plain integer, not localized-plural-aware yet (MVP).
__hints.common.badge.flagPending: Status chip on a citizen's own flagged-correction list (/account/submissions) while a curator has not yet acted on it.
__hints.common.badge.flagAccepted: Status chip when a curator accepted and published the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.flagRejected: Status chip when a curator reviewed and rejected the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.wardReady: Curator/admin chip: this ward's report cards meet the publish-readiness bar.
__hints.common.badge.wardHeld: Curator/admin chip: this ward is missing required data and is held back from readiness — a work state, not an error (design-system.md §7.13).
